what_changed: Membership growth was net +1 this week.
Studio utilization trend improved versus the previous week.
recommended_next_actions: Shift 20-30% of Meta budget to high-intent Google Search campaigns.
Promote first-booker membership upgrade offer in follow-up email and Instagram stories.
Send a targeted Creator-tier nurture campaign focused on underused credits and session planning.

email_recommendations.objective: Convert recent guest or first-time bookings into membership signups.
email_recommendations.audience: Guests and first-time bookers from the last 30 days.
subject_options: Ready to make FO Studio your weekly home?

Keep your momentum: member pricing inside
key_points: Highlight membership value against one-off booking costs.
Include the active seasonal promo code and expiration date.

email_recommendations.objective: Increase booked sessions among active Creator members with low recent utilization.
email_recommendations.audience: Active Creator members with less than 25% usage in the last 30 days.
subject_options: Use your studio access before this month closes

key_points: Remind members of included access and current booking availability.
